description_long: This is a vintage metal lunchbox-style toolbox with a rectangular form and rounded edges, featuring a prominent Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles graphic on the front panel. The surface is heavily weathered, showing patches of rust and worn green paint, giving it an aged, well-used appearance. The top of the box has a sturdy, folding metal handle with a black grip, attached by two metal brackets. A single metal clasp is visible on the front, serving as the main latch mechanism to secure the lid. The back and sides are plain, with the same distressed green finish and no additional graphics or compartments. The overall construction suggests a hollow interior suitable for storing tools or small items, with no visible external trays or dividers.
description: A weathered, green metal toolbox with a Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles graphic on the front, a folding metal handle, and a single clasp latch. The surface is rusted and aged, with a sturdy, rectangular build.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles graphic, the main clasp latch, and the folding handle on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the rusted green surface and the handle, with the front graphic partially visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays a plain, rusted green panel with no graphics or latches, and the handle on top.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the same rusted green finish as the left, with the handle and box edges visible.
attribute_handle_type: Folding rectangular metal handle with a black plastic grip, attached by two metal brackets; designed for carrying and can be laid flat when not in use.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single front metal clasp latch, likely steel, with a simple flip mechanism; no keyhole or combination lock visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles logo is visible on the front panel, rectangular with orange and green text above the character graphic.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal or external compartments, trays, or dividers are visible; the box appears to have a single main hollow compartment.
attribute_external_labeling: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles logo and character graphic on the front panel.
